/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang --target=aarch64-none-linux-android24 --sysroot=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot -fPIC -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments  -Wl,--gc-sections  -shared -Wl,-soname,libwavpack.so -o libwavpack.so CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/common_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/decorr_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/entropy_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/extra1.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/extra2.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/open_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/open_filename.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/open_legacy.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/open_raw.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/pack.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/pack_dns.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/pack_floats.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/pack_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/read_words.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/tags.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/tag_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/unpack.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/unpack_floats.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/unpack_seek.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/unpack_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/write_words.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/pack_dsd.c.o CMakeFiles/wavpack.dir/src/unpack_dsd.c.o  -lm -latomic -lm
